query: SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'profiles' ORDER BY ordinal_position;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44CGVGm2icqKTys.root --database dhjXEh3xJpAVX7YUPGfJoF --execute SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'profiles' ORDER BY ordinal_position;
